toggle.descTempDisabled: Temporarily stopped; will resume after restarting the app
toggle.descNormal: Lets enabled sync directions run in the background and guides you through required permissions

main.footer: Background download and upload follow the Auto-write and Auto-push direction settings

notification.title: Persistent service notification
notification.desc: Keeping it on improves background service stability

battery.title: Ignore battery optimization
battery.desc: Prevents battery saver from interrupting background sync

download.title: Download from remote
download.desc: Receive new remote content in the background when Auto-write is on

upload.title: Upload local clipboard
upload.desc: Upload background clipboard changes when Auto-push is on

issue.service-unavailable: The selected method is not running
issue.system-restriction: MIUI is blocking background clipboard access
issue.monitoring-setup-required: Automatic copy detection still needs setup

setup.failed: Setup could not be completed; make sure Shizuku is running

restriction.title: Turn off the MIUI clipboard restriction
restriction.text: UniClip will use Shizuku to turn off MIUI's smart clipboard restriction so clipboard content can be read and written in the background. This may also disable the system smart clipboard feature.

change.title: Change background access method
change.text: After switching to {{method}}, UniClip will immediately guide you through any remaining setup.

enableAutoSync.title: Enable background auto-sync
enableAutoSync.text: Once enabled, the app keeps syncing the clipboard in the background. We'll guide you through battery, notification, and clipboard access for the selected method. Allowing all of them gives the best result, but declining still lets you keep using the app.

disableNotification.title: Turn off persistent notification
disableNotification.text: Turning off the persistent notification reduces background service stability and makes it more likely the system will terminate background tasks.

missingNotificationPermission.title: Notification permission missing
missingNotificationPermission.text: Notification permission hasn't been granted, so the persistent notification may not appear. We recommend allowing notifications in system settings.

enableUpload.title: Enable background upload of local clipboard
enableUpload.text:
You don't need to enable this option — UniClip also lets you upload text directly from the menu that pops up when you select text.

On Android 10 and above, apps can't directly read the local clipboard in the background. You may need to enable the overlay or use another tool to work around this limitation.

batteryFallback.title: Can't open system dialog
batteryFallback.text: The system only allows the battery optimization request to appear once per installation. Please turn off battery optimization manually in system settings.
